name: Limello Fluff
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jello according to package directions and allow it to set until almost firm.
2. In a double boiler, cream together the marshmallows and Cream Cheese. Allow this mixture to partially cool while you prepare the Dream Whip.
3. In a large mixing bowl, using low speed, blend together the cream cheese-marshmallow mixture, Dream Whip, and semi-set Jello.
4. Add the drained pineapple and chopped pecans to the mixing bowl.
5. Pour the mixture into a mold and chill until firmly set.
6. Serves 6.
Note: This recipe is from The Cookie Lady's Files.
